name: Chocolate Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs with electric mixer at medium speed until frothy.
2. Gradually add sugar, beating until thick.
3. Add the remaining ingredients: half-and-half, cream, chocolate syrup, and vanilla extract. Mix well.
4. Pour the mixture into a freezer can of a 1-gallon hand-turned or electric freezer.
5. Add enough milk to fill the can about 3/4 full.
6. Freeze according to manufacturer's instructions.
7. Let ripen for at least 1 hour before serving.
